column1: "title": "Select Content Creation Template from Curated List"
"description": "Verify users can select a content creation template from the curated list categorized by purpose."

"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Navigate to template selection section
Select a template from the curated list"
"expected": "Selected template pre-populates post creation screen with relevant prompts and formatting options"
"successCriteria": "Template loads with correct prompts and formatting options"
"description": "Verify that only Vibe admin role holders can access the Org Update template."

"steps": "Login as non-admin user
Open 'Create Post'
Check template list for 'Org Update'
Login as Vibe admin user
Open 'Create Post'
Check template list for 'Org Update'"
"expected": "Non-admin users do not see 'Org Update' template\nAdmin users see 'Org Update' template"
"successCriteria": "'Org Update' template visibility matches user role"
"description": "Verify default audience is 'All Employees' when creating post from main feed."
"steps": "Open Vibe main feed\nClick 'Create Post'\nObserve default audience selection"
"description": "Verify default audience is group members and audience cannot be changed when creating post from within a group."

"steps": "Open a group feed
Click 'Create Post'
Observe default audience selection
Attempt to change audience"
"expected": "Default audience is group members\nAudience selection is disabled"
"description": "Verify user can change audience to group
column4: or network when posting from main feed."

column1:
"steps": "Open Vibe main feed
Click 'Create Post'
Change audience to a group user is part of
Change audience to department
Change audience to location
Change audience to network"
"expected": "Audience changes successfully to selected option each time"
"successCriteria": "Audience selection is editable and updates correctly"
"title": "Toggle Visibility and Behavior for Comments & Replies"
"description": "Verify 'Allow Comments & Replies' toggle visibility and behavior based on admin settings and user override."

"steps": "Login as user
Check if admin has enabled comments & replies
Open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle visibility
If toggle visible
column2: enable and disable toggle\nPost content\nVerify comments & replies behavior"

column1: "expected": "'Allow Comments & Replies' toggle visible only if admin enabled globally\nUser can override admin disablement for own post\nToggle not visible if admin disables globally"
"successCriteria": "Toggle visibility and behavior matches admin settings and user override"
"title": "Toggle Visibility for 'Post on Behalf of Company'"
"description": "Verify 'Post on Behalf of Company' toggle is visible only to admin persona."

"steps": "Login as non-admin user
Open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle not visible
Login as admin user
Open 'Create Post'
Verify toggle visible"
"expected": "'Post on Behalf of Company' toggle visible only to admin users"

column4: and videos are enforced during post creation."

column1:
"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Upload 2 gifs
Upload 6 images
Upload 6 files
Upload 6 videos
Observe system behavior"

column4: 5 videos (250MB each)\nUploads exceeding limits are rejected with appropriate message"

column1: "description": "Verify user is informed of attachment limits on hover over each attachment icon."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Hover mouse over gif attachment icon
Hover mouse over image attachment icon
Hover mouse over file attachment icon
Hover mouse over video attachment icon"
"expected": "Tooltip shows correct attachment limits for each type"
"description": "Verify toggles are placed after main content entry to avoid distraction."
"steps": "Open 'Create Post'\nObserve placement of toggles relative to content input area"
"description": "Verify Good Reads template requires a valid online link before enabling Post button."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Select 'Good Reads' template
Leave link field empty
Verify Post button disabled
Enter invalid link
Verify Post button disabled
Enter valid online link
Verify Post button enabled"
"expected": "Post button enabled only after valid online link is entered"
"title": "Seeking Mentorship Template Validation - Mandatory Poster Text"
"description": "Verify Seeking Mentorship template requires poster text before enabling Post button."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Select 'Seeking Mentorship' template
Leave poster text empty
Verify Post button disabled
Enter poster text
Verify Post button enabled"
"expected": "Post button enabled only after poster text is entered"
"successCriteria": "Post button state matches poster text presence"
"title": "Ice Breaker Template Validation - Mandatory Poster Text for All Line Items"
"description": "Verify Ice Breaker template requires poster text for all three line items before enabling Post button."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Select 'Ice Breaker' template
Enter poster text for 2 line items only
Verify Post button disabled
Enter poster text for all 3 line items
Verify Post button enabled"
"expected": "Post button enabled only after all line items have poster text"
"successCriteria": "Post button state matches completeness of line item text"
"title": "Pet Pics Template Validation - At Least One Picture Upload"
"description": "Verify Pet Pics template requires at least one picture upload before enabling Post button."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Select 'Pet Pics' template
Do not upload any picture
Verify Post button disabled
Upload one picture
Verify Post button enabled"
"expected": "Post button enabled only after at least one picture is uploaded"
"successCriteria": "Post button state matches picture upload presence"
"title": "Schedule Post for Future Date and Time"
"description": "Verify users can schedule posts by selecting a future date and time."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Enter valid post content
Select schedule option
Pick a future date and time
Submit scheduled post"
"expected": "Post is scheduled successfully for selected future date and time"
"successCriteria": "Scheduled post appears in scheduled posts list with correct date/time"
"description": "Verify users can edit scheduled posts before the scheduled posting time."

"steps": "Navigate to scheduled posts list
Select a scheduled post
Edit post content or scheduled date/time
Save changes"
"expected": "Scheduled post updates successfully with new content or schedule"
"successCriteria": "Scheduled post reflects updated content and schedule"
"description": "Verify users can cancel scheduled posts before the scheduled posting time."

"steps": "Navigate to scheduled posts list
Select a scheduled post
Click cancel or delete
Confirm cancellation"
"expected": "Scheduled post is removed and will not be posted"
"successCriteria": "Scheduled post no longer appears in scheduled posts list"
"description": "Verify posts created via templates automatically include a hashtag matching the template name in Pascal casing without spaces."

"steps": "Create post using 'Good Reads' template
Submit post
View post on feed
Create post using 'Seeking Mentorship' template
Submit post
View post on feed"
"expected": "Posts include hashtags '#GoodReads' and '#SeekingMentorship' respectively\nHashtags are clickable and filter feed"
"successCriteria": "Hashtags added and clickable as per template name"
"title": "Preview Post Before Submission for All Template Types"
"description": "Verify users can preview posts before submitting for all template types."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Select each template type one by one
Enter required content
Click 'Preview' button
Review post preview"
"expected": "Preview displays post content accurately for each template type"
"description": "Verify users can optionally use GPT assistance to proof-read or generate post content based on prompts."

"steps": "Open 'Create Post'
Select any template
Enter partial content or prompt
Click GPT assistance button
Review generated or proof-read content
Accept or reject GPT suggestions"
"expected": "GPT assistance provides relevant content suggestions or proof-reading\nUser can accept or reject suggestions"
"title": "First Time User Experience with Priority Templates and Nudges"
"description": "Verify first-time users see priority templates and nudges to explore templates and contribution days."

"steps": "Login as first-time user
Open 'Create Post'
Observe template list
Observe nudges about exploring templates and days since last contribution"
"expected": "Priority templates 'Ice Breaker' and 'Seeking Mentorship' are emphasized\nNudges are visible"
"title": "Returning User Experience with Template Segregation and Highlighting"
"description": "Verify returning users see separate sections for templates already contributed to and highlighted templates not yet contributed."

"steps": "Login as returning user
Open 'Create Post'
Observe template segregation
Verify highlighting of templates not yet contributed"
"description": "Verify template order reverts to original after 14 days."

"steps": "Login as user
Observe template order
Simulate 14 days passing
Reopen 'Create Post'
Observe template order"
"expected": "Template order reverts to original after 14 days"
"successCriteria": "Template order matches expected behavior after 14 days"
